criterion.text: repo_wide_legacy_audit.md exists at project root with all 5 classification sections
criterion.evidence: File exists. Sections confirmed: DELETE_CANDIDATE_HIGH, DELETE_CANDIDATE_LOW, MODIFY_CANDIDATE, PRESERVE, NEEDS_INVESTIGATION all present.

criterion.text: git diff --name-only HEAD does not include pipeline.py, .claude/agents/*.md, .github/workflows/ci.yml or other product code
criterion.evidence: git diff origin/main..HEAD shows only: repo_wide_legacy_audit.md, tests/oracles/IMP-20260611-6574/ (oracle files). No product code modified.

criterion.text: DELETE_CANDIDATE_HIGH section contains at least 1 item with legacy harness/score pattern
criterion.evidence: 4 items found: DH-1 (cmd_harness line 7216), DH-2 (_parse_harness_report_et line 114), DH-3 (p_harness parser line 18399), DH-4 (AGENTS.md wrong path). harness, score, cmd_harness, _parse_harness patterns all confirmed.

criterion.text: Each item includes filename, location, and rationale for legacy classification
criterion.evidence: 22 total items (4 DH + 3 DL + 5 MC + 6 PR + 4 NI). Each item has structured fields: file, location (line number or section), legacy rationale relative to current SSoT baseline.

scope_check.forbidden_files_check: PASS — no pipeline.py, no .claude/agents/*.md, no .github/workflows/, no CLAUDE.md, no cleanup_report.md modified
scope_check.fast_analysis_compliance: PASS — 1 micro-task, no product code modification

qa_report.summary: FAST_ANALYSIS meta-task QA PASS. repo_wide_legacy_audit.md correctly generated with all 5 classification sections. 22 items classified across categories. No product code modified. DELETE_CANDIDATE_HIGH contains 4 items including cmd_harness (line 7216), _parse_harness_report_et (line 114), p_harness parser (line 18399), AGENTS.md wrong path. All 4 acceptance criteria verified PASS.
